name: body_end

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.19 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-25] ［＃本文終わり］ is a block-level structural leaf marking the end of the main body (a colophon/afterword follows); it renders as the empty aozora-body-end div between paragraphs and round-trips unchanged. The #1 unrecognised body before #78 (242 occurrences). Offsets from the §3 byte model.

source:
第一章
本文。
［＃本文終わり］
奥付。
